G1484.strongs_def: a race (as of the same habit), i.e. a tribe; specially, a foreign (non-Jewish) one (usually, by implication, pagan)

G1456.derivation: neuter plural of a presumed compound from G1722 (ἐν) and G2537 (καινός);
G1456.strongs_def: innovatives, i.e. (specially) renewal (of religious services after the Antiochian interruption)

G1467.strongs_def: to exercise self-restraint (in diet and chastity)

G1451.derivation: from a primary verb (to squeeze or throttle;
G1451.strongs_def: akin to the base of G43 (ἀγκάλη)); near (literally or figuratively, of place or time)
G1451.kjv_def: from , at hand, near, nigh (at hand, unto), ready

G1481.strongs_def: the governor (not king) of a district

G1480.strongs_def: to accustom, i.e. (neuter passive participle) customary

G1459.strongs_def: to leave behind in some place, i.e. (in a good sense) let remain over, or (in a bad sense) to desert

G1496.derivation: from G1497 (εἴδωλον) and the base of G3000 (λατρεύω);
G1496.strongs_def: an image- (servant or) worshipper (literally or figuratively)

G1439.strongs_def: to let be, i.e. permit or leave alone

G1492.strongs_def: used only in certain past tenses, the others being borrowed from the equivalent G3700 (ὀπτάνομαι) and G3708 (ὁράω); properly, to see (literally or figuratively); by implication, (in the perfect tense only) to know
G1492.kjv_def: be aware, behold, X can (+ not tell), consider, (have) know(-ledge), look (on), perceive, see, be sure, tell, understand, wish, wot
G1492.usage: know(281x), wist(6x), see(314x), behold(17x), look(5x), perceive(5x)

G1452.derivation: neuter of the comparative of G1451 (ἐγγύς);

G1458.strongs_def: to call in (as a debt or demand), i.e. bring to account (charge, criminate, etc.)
G1458.kjv_def: accuse, call in question, implead, lay to the charge

G1448.kjv_def: approach, be at hand, come (draw) near, be (come, draw) nigh

G1427.strongs_def: two and ten, i.e. a dozen

G1471.derivation: from G1722 (ἐν) and the base of G2949 (κῦμα);

G1491.strongs_def: a view, i.e. form (literally or figuratively)

G1401.strongs_def: a slave (literal or figurative, involuntary or voluntary; frequently, therefore in a qualified sense of subjection or subserviency)

G1489.strongs_def: if indeed, seeing that, unless, (with negative) otherwise

G1460.strongs_def: to settle down in a place, i.e. reside

G1424.strongs_def: the sun-set, i.e. (by implication) the western region

G1447.strongs_def: Hebraistically or in the Jewish (Chaldee) language

G1422.strongs_def: properly, fastidious about eating (peevish), i.e. (genitive case) impracticable

G1462.kjv_def: crime laid against, laid to charge

G1468.strongs_def: strong in a thing (masterful), i.e. (figuratively and reflexively) self-controlled (in appetite, etc.)

G1494.derivation: neuter of a compound of G1497 (εἴδωλον) and a presumed derivative of G2380 (θύω);
G1494.strongs_def: an image-sacrifice, i.e. part of an idolatrous offering
G1494.kjv_def: (meat, thing that is) offered (in sacrifice, sacrificed) to (unto) idols

G1497.strongs_def: an image (i.e. for worship); by implication, a heathen god, or (plural) the worship of such

G1488.derivation: second person singular present of G1510 (εἰμί);

G1463.derivation: middle voice from G1722 (ἐν) and (to gird);
G1463.strongs_def: to engirdle oneself (for labor), i.e. figuratively (the apron as being a badge of servitude) to wear (in token of mutual deference)

G1437.strongs_def: a conditional particle; in case that, provided, etc.; often used in connection with other particles to denote indefiniteness or uncertainty
G1437.kjv_def: before, but, except, (and) if, (if) so, (what-, whither-)soever, though, when (-soever), whether (or), to whom, (who-)so(-ever)

G1438.derivation: from a reflexive pronoun otherwise obsolete and the genitive case (dative case or accusative case) of G846 (αὐτός);
G1438.strongs_def: him- (her-, it-, them-, also (in conjunction with the personal pronoun of the other persons) my-, thy-, our-, your-) self (selves), etc.
G1438.kjv_def: alone, her (own, -self), (he) himself, his (own), itself, one (to) another, our (thine) own(-selves), + that she had, their (own, own selves), (of) them(-selves), they, thyself, you, your (own, own conceits, own selves, -selves)
G1438.usage: himself(110x), themselves(57x), yourselves(36x), ourselves(20x), his(19x), their(15x), itself(9x)

G1420.derivation: from G1418 (δυσ-) and a comparative of G1787 (ἐντός) (meaning a bowel);

G1453.derivation: probably akin to the base of G58 (ἀγορά) (through the idea of collecting one's faculties);
G1453.strongs_def: to waken (transitively or intransitively), i.e. rouse (literally, from sleep, from sitting or lying, from disease, from death; or figuratively, from obscurity, inactivity, ruins, nonexistence)
G1453.kjv_def: awake, lift (up), raise (again, up), rear up, (a-)rise (again, up), stand, take up

G1455.derivation: from G1722 (ἐν) and a derivative of G2524 (καθίημι);
G1455.strongs_def: subinduced, i.e. surreptitiously suborned as a lier-in-wait

G1498.derivation: optative (i.e. English subjunctive) present of G1510 (εἰμί) (including the other person);
G1498.kjv_def: mean, + perish, should be, was, were

G1473.derivation: a primary pronoun of the first person I (only expressed when emphatic)

G1426.derivation: from a compound of G1418 (δυσ-) and G5345 (φήμη);

G1416.derivation: prolonged forms of an obsolete primary (to sink);

G1479.strongs_def: voluntary (arbitrary and unwarranted) piety, i.e. sanctimony

G1486.strongs_def: to be used (by habit or conventionality); neuter perfect participle usage

G1410.kjv_def: be able, can (do, + -not), could, may, might, be possible, be of power

G1419.derivation: from G1418 (δυσ-) and a derivative of G941 (βαστάζω);

G1436.strongs_def: properly, let it be, i.e. (as interjection) aha!

G1405.derivation: perhaps akin to the base of G1404 (δράκων) (through the idea of capturing);

G1409.derivation: a feminine diminutive of Drusus (a Roman name);
G1409.strongs_def: Drusilla, a member of the Herodian family

G1465.strongs_def: to cut into, i.e. (figuratively) impede, detain

G1469.strongs_def: to judge in, i.e. count among

G1430.strongs_def: properly, an edifice, i.e. (specially) a roof

G1402.kjv_def: bring into (be under) bondage, X given, become (make) servant

G1415.strongs_def: powerful or capable (literally or figuratively); neuter possible
G1415.kjv_def: able, could, (that is) mighty (man), possible, power, strong
G1415.usage: possible(13x), able(10x), mighty(6x), strong(3x), could(1x), power(1x)

G1450.strongs_def: pledged (as if articulated by a member), i.e. a bondsman

G1432.derivation: accusative case of G1431 (δωρεά) as adverb;
G1432.kjv_def: without a cause, freely, for naught, in vain

G1470.strongs_def: to conceal in, i.e. incorporate with

G1493.derivation: neuter of a presumed derivative of G1497 (εἴδωλον);

G1404.derivation: probably from an alternate form of (to look);
G1404.strongs_def: a fabulous kind of serpent (perhaps as supposed to fascinate)

G1418.derivation: a primary inseparable particle of uncertain derivation;
G1418.strongs_def: used only in composition as a prefix; hard, i.e. with difficulty

G1440.derivation: from G1442 (ἕβδομος) and a modified form of G1176 (δέκα);

G1411.strongs_def: force (literally or figuratively); specially, miraculous power (usually by implication, a miracle itself)
G1411.kjv_def: ability, abundance, meaning, might(-ily, -y, -y deed), (worker of) miracle(-s), power, strength, violence, mighty (wonderful) work
G1411.usage: power(77x), strength(7x), miracle(7x), might(4x), virtue(3x), mighty(2x)

G1425.derivation: from G1418 (δυσ-) and a derivative of G3539 (νοιέω);

G1490.derivation: from G1487 (εἰ), G1161 (δέ), and G3361 (μή) (sometimes with G1065 (γέ) added);

G1485.strongs_def: a usage (prescribed by habit or law)

G1461.derivation: from G1722 (ἐν) and a derivative of G2759 (κέντρον);

G1421.derivation: from G1418 (δυσ-) and a presumed derivative of G2059 (ἑρμηνεύω);
